acceptance_mapping.deterministic_reproduction: post-rename observation hook used only by tests
acceptance_mapping.internal_recovery_identity: apply and rollback failure compensation reuse the identity-bound helper with the previously recorded effect device/inode
acceptance_mapping.multi_entry_and_idempotence: focused tests cover exact prior-entry compensation after internal-recovery interference and legacy schema-2 rerun/rollback
acceptance_mapping.symmetric_apply_rollback: apply, explicit rollback, and both internal recovery directions use the same identity-bound helper
acceptance_mapping.synthetic_only: all race proofs use pytest temporary directories; active Bureau state is not migrated
acceptance_mapping.wrong_inode_safety: moved identity is captured before rename and compensation requires exact device/inode

decision.failure_mode: typed fail-closed incomplete recovery that preserves replacement evidence
decision.schema_transition: Plan and receipt schema stay at 2. New records bind effect_boundary; older schema-2 records remain usable under the stronger runtime guard without rewriting their hashes.
decision.selected_implementation: preopened O_PATH no-follow inode identity, exact post-effect check, exact-identity-only compensation, cooperative exclusive directory flock

method.claim_policy: No interface is treated as conditional expected-inode rename unless it atomically couples the name mutation to a caller-supplied device/inode identity.

residual_risk_owner: Uncooperative same-privilege writers remain outside mandatory flock exclusion. Crash and power-loss recovery remains OPERATOR-MACHINE-READABILITY-V1-T015.

guarantees: source device and inode are captured from an O_PATH no-follow descriptor before rename
post-effect source absence and destination device/inode equality are required
compensation acts only on the pre-captured expected device/inode
cooperating Bureau mutators hold nonblocking exclusive directory flocks
unsupported primitives fail closed without a path-based fallback
residual_risks: an uncooperative same-privilege process can ignore advisory directory flocks
interference can leave an evidence-preserving split state that requires bounded recovery
crash and power-loss durability require the separate recovery-journal contract

scope: Linux final-component rename identity boundary for Bureau state-root apply, explicit rollback, and internal failure compensation
